markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Evaluate GrowthX's AI-driven content service for Highspot's inbound strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/d8fbb1Mya422BH5ynxkmN93aQSkLnw86?tab=summary&timestamp=102.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Highspot's marketing team (2 people) generates 38% of new ARR pipeline but needs to mature its inbound motion to reduce reliance on an increasingly inefficient outbound model.](https://fathom.video/share/d8fbb1Mya422BH5ynxkmN93aQSkLnw86?tab=summary&timestamp=102.0)
  - [GrowthX offers an "agency as software" model, combining AI workflows with human experts to produce high-volume, high-quality content for SEO and GEO.](https://fathom.video/share/d8fbb1Mya422BH5ynxkmN93aQSkLnw86?tab=summary&timestamp=434.0)
  - [Highspot's primary interest is using GrowthX to create credible, educational content that helps buyers self-educate and differentiate Highspot, not just to increase content volume.](https://fathom.video/share/d8fbb1Mya422BH5ynxkmN93aQSkLnw86?tab=summary&timestamp=709.0)
  - [Next step: Lucas will connect Tyler with Highspot's content and web leads (Pam and Claire) for a technical deep-dive and demo.](https://fathom.video/share/d8fbb1Mya422BH5ynxkmN93aQSkLnw86?tab=summary&timestamp=1682.0)

## Topics

### Highspot's Marketing & Pipeline Strategy

  - [**Team:** Lucas Welch (Global Corporate Marketing) and Tassie (VP, Product & Community) form the entire marketing team.](https://fathom.video/share/d8fbb1Mya422BH5ynxkmN93aQSkLnw86?tab=summary&timestamp=109.0)
  - [**Pipeline Goal:** Generate 38% of new ARR pipeline annually; on track for the current fiscal year (ends Jan 31).](https://fathom.video/share/d8fbb1Mya422BH5ynxkmN93aQSkLnw86?tab=summary&timestamp=140.0)
  - [**Strategic Focus:** Build pipeline for the next fiscal year and mature the marketing tech stack.](https://fathom.video/share/d8fbb1Mya422BH5ynxkmN93aQSkLnw86?tab=summary&timestamp=140.0)
  - [**Current Tech Stack:** Salesforce, Marketo, Qualified (inbound chat), and Reggie (outbound AI agent).](https://fathom.video/share/d8fbb1Mya422BH5ynxkmN93aQSkLnw86?tab=summary&timestamp=317.0)
  - [**Core Challenge:** Highspot has a "signals issue," not a data issue.](https://fathom.video/share/d8fbb1Mya422BH5ynxkmN93aQSkLnw86?tab=summary&timestamp=317.0)
      - [**Problem:** Abundant data from intent signals (AdRoll), web activity, and sales is siloed and unanalyzed.](https://fathom.video/share/d8fbb1Mya422BH5ynxkmN93aQSkLnw86?tab=summary&timestamp=317.0)
      - [**Need:** An AI solution to consolidate, analyze, and automate the distribution of these signals to prioritize accounts and recommend actions.](https://fathom.video/share/d8fbb1Mya422BH5ynxkmN93aQSkLnw86?tab=summary&timestamp=382.0)

### GrowthX's "Agency as Software" Model

  - [**Service:** An end-to-end partner for SEO and GEO (Generative Engine Optimization).](https://fathom.video/share/d8fbb1Mya422BH5ynxkmN93aQSkLnw86?tab=summary&timestamp=434.0)
  - [**Model:** Combines sophisticated AI workflows with human experts.](https://fathom.video/share/d8fbb1Mya422BH5ynxkmN93aQSkLnw86?tab=summary&timestamp=434.0)
      - [**AI:** Uses major models and custom agents for research, drafting, and fact-checking.](https://fathom.video/share/d8fbb1Mya422BH5ynxkmN93aQSkLnw86?tab=summary&timestamp=483.0)
      - [**Experts:** A dedicated client team (Managing Director, Editor, Content Manager) provides oversight.](https://fathom.video/share/d8fbb1Mya422BH5ynxkmN93aQSkLnw86?tab=summary&timestamp=981.0)
  - [**Origin:** Founded by Marcel, who built organic content engines at HashiCorp ($6M→$100M ARR) and Scale.ai (acquired by Meta).](https://fathom.video/share/d8fbb1Mya422BH5ynxkmN93aQSkLnw86?tab=summary&timestamp=819.0)
  - [**Client Examples:** Outreach, Ramp, Okta, Udemy, Zapier, Brex.](https://fathom.video/share/d8fbb1Mya422BH5ynxkmN93aQSkLnw86?tab=summary&timestamp=1022.0)

### GrowthX's Content Creation Process

  - [**Phase 1: Strategy Sprint**](https://fathom.video/share/d8fbb1Mya422BH5ynxkmN93aQSkLnw86?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
      - [Creates artifacts (ICP, brand voice) to context-engineer AI workflows.](https://fathom.video/share/d8fbb1Mya422BH5ynxkmN93aQSkLnw86?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
      - [Publishes initial articles to align on quality and roadmap.](https://fathom.video/share/d8fbb1Mya422BH5ynxkmN93aQSkLnw86?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
  - [**Phase 2: 12-Month Growth Execution**](https://fathom.video/share/d8fbb1Mya422BH5ynxkmN93aQSkLnw86?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
      - [Publishes high-quality content daily.](https://fathom.video/share/d8fbb1Mya422BH5ynxkmN93aQSkLnw86?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
      - [**Content Types:** Editorial blogs, programmatic SEO pages (e.g., Ramp's 900+ vendor pages), interactive tools (calculators, classifiers).](https://fathom.video/share/d8fbb1Mya422BH5ynxkmN93aQSkLnw86?tab=summary&timestamp=1074.0)
  - [**Internal Platform Demo**](https://fathom.video/share/d8fbb1Mya422BH5ynxkmN93aQSkLnw86?tab=summary&timestamp=1311.0)
      - [**Artifacts:** Stores client-specific data (personas, brand voice) to inform all content.](https://fathom.video/share/d8fbb1Mya422BH5ynxkmN93aQSkLnw86?tab=summary&timestamp=1335.0)
      - [**Knowledge Base:** Ingests client-provided resources (e.g., first-party data) to improve AI accuracy and credibility.](https://fathom.video/share/d8fbb1Mya422BH5ynxkmN93aQSkLnw86?tab=summary&timestamp=1515.0)
      - [**Workflows:** Agentic AI pipelines for research (using Exa, Tavily), drafting, and fact-checking.](https://fathom.video/share/d8fbb1Mya422BH5ynxkmN93aQSkLnw86?tab=summary&timestamp=1489.0)
      - [**Expert Oversight:** Human editors can inspect drafts, provide instructions, and make direct edits.](https://fathom.video/share/d8fbb1Mya422BH5ynxkmN93aQSkLnw86?tab=summary&timestamp=1585.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Tyler:** Send follow-up resources (deck, video) to Lucas by EOD today.](https://fathom.video/share/d8fbb1Mya422BH5ynxkmN93aQSkLnw86?tab=summary&timestamp=1682.0)
  - [**Lucas:** Connect Tyler with Highspot's content lead (Pam) and web lead (Claire) to schedule a technical deep-dive and demo.](https://fathom.video/share/d8fbb1Mya422BH5ynxkmN93aQSkLnw86?tab=summary&timestamp=1682.0)
